mappings.rationaleAI: Internal states affecting human behavior and consciousness are central to this article on humans.
Emotions are the primary current internal states affecting human behavior and conscious experience.
Anger is an internal state affecting human behavior and conscious experience.
Fear is an internal state affecting human behavior and conscious experience.
Happiness is an internal state affecting human behavior and experience.
Love is a powerful internal state affecting human behavior and experience.
Sadness is an internal state affecting human behavior and conscious experience.
Dreams are internal states affecting conscious experience.
Sleep is an internal physiological state affecting behavior and conscious experience.
